description:
🚀 Access ALL video resources & get personalized help in my community:
https://www.skool.com/agentic-labs

In this video, you'll learn how to use Claude Code and N8N together to build powerful AI automation workflows.

🚀 Get Hostinger VPS (use code LEON for 10% off): https://hostinger.com/leon 
🚀 Start building with n8n (use my link to support my channel ❤️): https://n8n.partnerlinks.io/f7f19w3vrhin
💬 My AI voice-to-text software (Wispr Flow): https://wisprflow.ai/r?LEON114
☕ Buy me a coffee: https://www.buymeacoffee.com/leonvanzyl
💵 Donate using PayPal: https://www.paypal.com/ncp/payment/EKRQ8QSGV6CWW

🔗 CLAUDE CODE NOTIFICATIONS TUTORIAL:
https://youtu.be/DQ53vTJh9q4

⏰ TIMESTAMPS:
00:00 Why use Claude Code and N8N together
00:42 Rapid prototyping demo with SORA2 and N8N
01:49 Converting N8N workflow to a Next.js app
03:41 Building a frontend UI with N8N webhook backend
05:16 Customer support chatbot with N8N
07:12 Exposing N8N workflows as MCP servers
08:05 Setting up N8N data tables
08:45 Creating an MCP server from N8N data table
09:40 Connecting N8N MCP server to Claude Code
10:22 Claude Code notifications with N8N and Telegram
11:01 Self hosting N8N with Hostinger
12:07 Configuring Claude Code hooks for webhooks
13:25 Testing notifications on Telegram
14:05 Claude browser extension creating N8N workflows
15:13 Final thoughts

Sponsorship enquiries: sponsors@leonvanzyl.com

#claudecode #n8n #vibecoding
